title: Exponents
claim: Exponents represent repeated multiplication of a quantity by itself or structured scaling relations.
proof: aⁿ represents multiplying a by itself n times, compressing a repeated multiplicative structure.
validation: Level 5 — Mathematical / Logical Proof within arithmetic.
reconstruction: Can be rediscovered by repeatedly multiplying equal factors and introducing shorthand notation.

proof_layers.intuitive_explanation: aⁿ represents multiplying a by itself n times, compressing a repeated multiplicative structure.
proof_layers.formal_or_structural_proof: aⁿ represents multiplying a by itself n times, compressing a repeated multiplicative structure.
